candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% SHORT but green_matches=0, only trade the pair whose hist_hr exceeds 65% — the others are conviction without historical confirmation.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 100% indicator agreement with zero green_matches means the live state has no analog in the historical memory bank — the consensus is internally coherent but never validated against past outcomes. Pairs like EURUSD (hist_hr=66%) and AUDUSD (hist_hr=72%) carry institutional flow patterns that recurred profitably; USDJPY SHORT-equivalent and GBPUSD at hist_hr=0% are novel configurations that haven't survived a single forward test. Institutional positioning leaves repeatable footprints — when none match, the signal is regime noise dressed as conviction.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.65: veto_trade()  # require historical hit-rate confirmation when no green matches exist
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Filters out conv=100% traps on USDJPY (hist_hr=0%) and GBPUSD; routes capital only to EURUSD/AUDUSD shorts with proven 66-72% hit rates. Expected win-rate lift +4-7%, Sharpe contribution +0.02-0.03 via reduced false-positive entries.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus state shows EURUSD SHORT conv=100% hist_hr=66% and AUDUSD SHORT conv=100% hist_hr=72%, but USDJPY LONG conv=100% hist_hr=0% and GBPUSD NEUTRAL hist_hr=0% — identical conviction, opposite historical validation. All green_matches=0, isolating hist_hr as the discriminating field.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightens USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate assuming safe-haven corruption, but current live state shows USDJPY consensus LONG conv=100% with hist_hr=0% — the gate may be filtering on VIX when the real failure driver is missing historical match; worth re-validating which field actually predicts USDJPY failure.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in last 7 days with Regime=UNKNOWN and TV showing 0 signals — system is in observational drought; capital_allocator should hold at 75% sizing until regime resolves and decision logs accumulate.
